<p class="key-answer" data-question="Methylthioninium Chloride 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Methylthioninium Chloride</strong> 目前有 <strong>2 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Methylthioninium Chloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Lumeblue is indicated as a diagnostic agent enhancing visualisation of colorectal lesions in adult patients undergoing screening or surveillance colonoscopy.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>irritable bowel syndrome（90.4%）</li>
<li>dysthymic disorder（88.5%）</li>
<li>anaphylaxis（88.1%）</li>
<li>food-dependent exercise-induced anaphylaxis（87.8%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（85.5%）</li>
<li>anxiety（80.6%）</li>
<li>obsolete rare pulmonary disease（75.2%）</li>
<li>variably protease-sensitive prionopathy（74.8%）</li>
<li>autonomic nervous system disease（74.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary edema（73.9%）</li>
<li>pityriasis simplex（73.5%）</li>
<li>multiple system atrophy（72.8%）</li>
<li>cauda equina syndrome（71.0%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（69.9%）</li>
<li>acrodermatitis chronica atrophicans（67.8%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（67.1%）</li>
<li>obsolete neurogenic bladder (disease)（66.7%）</li>
<li>neurocirculatory asthenia（65.8%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（65.7%）</li>
<li>benign paroxysmal torticollis of infancy（65.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/methylthioninium-chloride/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
